core:FragmentDefinition:
<%if (typeof eventHandler !== 'undefined') {%> <ComboBox id="<% if (typeof controlID !== 'undefined' && controlID) { %><%- controlID %><% } else { %><%- ids.comboBox %><% } %>" width="100%" core:require="{handler: '<%- eventHandler.split('.').slice(0, -1).join('/') %>'}" selectedKey="{path: 'filterValues>', type: 'sap.fe.macros.filter.type.Value', formatOptions: { operator: '<%- eventHandler %>' }}" ><% } else { %> <ComboBox id="<% if (typeof controlID !== 'undefined' && controlID) { %><%- controlID %><% } else { %><%- ids.comboBox %><% } %>" width="100%"><% } %>
<core:Item id="<%- ids.item1 %>" key="0" text="Item1"/> <core:Item id="<%- ids.item2 %>" key="1" text="Item2"/> <core:Item id="<%- ids.item3 %>" key="2" text="Item3"/>
